pack_description: A collection of cantrips for roleplay and creative writing with GitInTheVan. Includes dice rolling, context management, adaptive lorebooks, multi-character support, faction management, persistent memory, and progressive disclosure systems.

files.name: Adaptive Lorebook Template
files.description: Manages token usage by dynamically adjusting lore detail level (full/summary/bullet) based on keyword mention count and relevance.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Advanced Faction Management Template
files.description: Two-mode faction governance system (roleplay + management interface). Tracks diplomacy, resources, projects, and population with persistent state.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Anti-Omniscience Investigation Template
files.description: Progressive disclosure system preventing the LLM from knowing things it shouldn't. Uses flag-gated content unlocking with strict information isolation.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Complex Lorebook Template
files.description: Complex dynamic lorebook foundation with cascading keyword triggers, timeline events, stat parsing, and priority-based lore ordering.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Context Aware Multiple Character Template
files.description: Advanced drop-in/drop-out character management with adaptive detail levels (full/limited/summary) that scale to the available token budget.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Context Control Awareness Template
files.description: Companion script that reads token budgets injected by the Context Control Template. Adapts lore detail levels (full/summary/bullets) to stay within the per-script allocation.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Context Control Template
files.description: Master context management script. Provides /maxtokens command for selecting context window size, then calculates and injects per-script token budgets for all active content scripts.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Dice Controller
files.description: Intercepts /roll commands and dice requests. Supports polyhedral dice, exploding dice, Savage Worlds Aces/Wild Die. Injects formatted results into scenario.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Hidden Persistent Memory Template
files.description: Modular persistent state system using zero-width unicode for invisible data transmission. Tracks weather, location, and emotional state across messages.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Multiple Character Template
files.description: Basic drop-in/drop-out character management. Characters included dynamically based on recent context mentions via regex matching.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Persistent Flags Lorebook Template
files.description: Hex-based flag system for tracking persistent state across sessions. Includes anti-cheat validation and dynamic lore activation based on flag state.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Progressive Sentence Lorebook Template
files.description: Builds context sentence-by-sentence by priority tiers (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) instead of switching between full/summary/bullet versions.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Property Exploration
files.description: Debug and utility script that inspects context.character and context.chat object properties and types. Outputs to console.log for debugging.
files.author: Tydorius

files.name: Time Delay Script Template
files.description: Progressive disclosure via message-count thresholds. Tracks hours, canon count, and timeline events. Embeds hidden clues that unlock at specific story beats.
files.author: Tydorius
